overall.description: First-person gameplay footage navigating a cyberpunk urban environment with elevated metal walkways, industrial machinery, and neon signage. The player moves through narrow alleys and enclosed passages, transitioning between shadowed interiors and sunlit exteriors in a densely packed futuristic city.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial back alley with corrugated metal walls and scattered barrels. The player ascends a metal staircase to an elevated walkway, passing an NPC sitting at a small table. The environment is dimly lit with shadows dominating the enclosed space, transitioning to slightly brighter ambient light as the player climbs higher.

segments.scene_description: The player walks along an elevated industrial walkway with yellow safety railings on both sides. Large carbon dioxide storage tanks dominate the left side while the view opens up to reveal a dense cyberpunk cityscape in the background. The lighting shifts from shadow to bright sunlight, and an NPC is seen walking toward the camera from the distance.

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a dense urban canyon with towering cyberpunk architecture rising on all sides. The camera tilts up to reveal a complex network of overhead bridges, cables, and industrial structures against a bright sky. Steam rises from vents below, catching the dramatic sunlight streaming between the buildings, while neon blue signs glow on the right wall.

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a pharmacy marked by a prominent neon green medical cross sign. Entering the dimly lit interior, the player finds two NPCs at the counter - a customer and a clerk - with neon signage illuminating the space. After a brief moment inside, the player exits back to the walkway, transitioning from the artificial interior lighting back to the exterior environment.

segments.scene_description: The player exits the pharmacy and proceeds through a narrow alleyway with walls covered in colorful graffiti. Overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the passage, which leads toward an intensely bright exit. As the player approaches the end of the alley, the view opens up to reveal the city street below and bright sunlight streaming in, marking the transition from the enclosed industrial area to a more open urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial alleyway into the expansive, sun-drenched heights of a cyberpunk cityscape. It begins in a narrow corridor of corrugated metal and scattered barrels, ascending a metal staircase past a seated NPC as the dim shadows give way to brighter ambient light. As the camera reaches an elevated walkway, the space opens up beside large carbon dioxide tanks and yellow safety railings, shifting abruptly from darkness into bright sunlight that reveals a dense urban horizon. The scene then expands into a towering urban canyon where the camera tilts upward to capture a complex network of overhead bridges and cables against a brilliant sky. Finally, the movement glides past glowing neon blue signs and rising steam vents that catch the dramatic light streaming between the massive architectural structures.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a dimly lit interior pharmacy into a bright, open urban cityscape. It begins by approaching a pharmacy marked by a neon green medical cross, moving inside to a shadowed space where a clerk and customer stand beneath artificial neon lights. As the camera exits the building and returns to the walkway, the scene shifts into a narrow alleyway defined by colorful graffiti and overhead fluorescent lighting. The passage then leads toward an intensely bright exit, where the enclosed industrial walls give way to a wide view of the city street below. Finally, the environment opens completely as the camera emerges into the streaming sunlight of the open urban space.
